title: podman pull download output is verbose

comments.body: I can not find the place where the string is constructed. Either GitHub search is broken, or it is in some 3rdparty lib.

https://github.com/containers/image
```
grep -r "Copying blob" -r .
./copy/copy.go:	ic.c.Printf("Copying blob %s\n", srcInfo.Digest)
```

Aha, it is a different repository!

https://github.com/containers/image/blob/63a1cbdc5e6537056695cf0d627c0a33b334df53/copy/copy.go#L525

There are two places where the bar is referred.

https://github.com/containers/image/blob/63a1cbdc5e6537056695cf0d627c0a33b334df53/copy/copy.go#L644

https://github.com/containers/image/blob/63a1cbdc5e6537056695cf0d627c0a33b334df53/copy/copy.go#L690

L644 looks like the right thing to patch, and it uses https://github.com/cheggaaa/pb
Gotcha!
Nope. I am worrying about money balance and can't concentrate on doing experiments with https://github.com/cheggaaa/pb/tree/v2 - `v1` doesn't provide necessary customization options.

This will conflict with our current work on parallelizing the copying of layers. The output of the progress bars will be less verbose than before:
```
[valentin@nebuchadnezzar libpod]$ podman pull nginx
Trying to pull docker.io/nginx:latest...Getting image source signatures
Copying blob a5a6f2f73cd8: 21.44 MiB / 21.44 MiB [==========================] 9s
Copying blob 1ba02017c4b2: 21.18 MiB / 21.18 MiB [==========================] 9s
Copying blob 33b176c904de: 203 B / 203 B [==================================] 9s
Copying config 568c4670fa80: 5.88 KiB / 5.88 KiB [==========================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
568c4670fa800978e08e4a51132b995a54f8d5ae83ca133ef5546d092b864acf
```
In case you're interested, you can play with a branch on my containers/image fork at https://github.com/vrothberg/image/tree/parapull
I don't see any reason to duplicate efforts, and I'd let this be handled by parallel branch. For the output above does "Copying config" need a sha and progress bar? Where is it copied from?

> I don't see any reason to duplicate efforts, and I'd let this be handled by parallel branch. For the output above does "Copying config" need a sha and progress bar? Where is it copied from?

It was shown before, so I thought I keep it. I think it makes sense to display it as it's also being downloaded from the registry (https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/nginx/blobs/sha256:568c4670fa800978e08e4a51132b995a54f8d5ae83ca133ef5546d092b864acf).
I agree we should work this in parallel work.  @abitrolly We would love to have your help and feedback on this.
